evidence.page_title: Systeme.io Pricing — Free, Startup, Webinar, Unlimited Plans
evidence.content:
How does systeme.io pricing work and what do I get on each plan?

systeme.io has four plans based primarily on contact limits. Free: 2,000 contacts, 3 sales funnels, 1 course, all features. Startup ($17/month): 5,000 contacts, unlimited funnels, 5 courses. Webinar ($47/month): 10,000 contacts, unlimited everything plus automated webinar feature. Unlimited ($97/month): unlimited contacts, all features, sub-accounts, and free migration service. All plans include unlimited email sends, 0% transaction fees, and the same set of core tools.

Does systeme.io have a free plan and what are its limits?

Yes — the free plan supports up to 2,000 contacts, 3 sales funnels, 1 blog, 1 course, 1 affiliate program, and 1 custom domain. Emails and file storage are unlimited. The free plan never expires and does not require a credit card. The only meaningful limits are on funnels and courses — if you need more than 3 funnels or 1 course, the Startup plan at $17/month is the next step.

Which systeme.io pricing plan should I choose for my business size?

Under 2,000 contacts: use the free plan — it costs nothing and covers most needs. 2,000 to 5,000 contacts: Startup at $17/month. 5,000 to 10,000 contacts: Webinar at $47/month (also adds automated webinar funnels). Over 10,000 contacts or if you manage clients: Unlimited at $97/month. Agencies who want white-label or resell functionality should contact the systeme.io team for white label pricing.

Is systeme.io cheaper than using separate tools for funnels, email, and courses?

Typically, yes — significantly. A comparable tool stack would include: ClickFunnels ($97/month) for funnels, Mailchimp ($20/month) for email, Teachable ($39/month) for courses, and Tapfiliate ($89/month) for affiliates — totaling $245/month before connecting them. systeme.io covers all of this on the free plan or for $17/month. Even the Unlimited plan at $97/month is cheaper than a single tool from many competitors.

Can I change or cancel my systeme.io plan at any time and what happens to my data?

Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. If you cancel, your data remains accessible on the free plan as long as your contact count stays within the 2,000 limit. If you cancel and your list exceeds the free plan's contact limit, your account reverts to the free plan and contacts above the limit are archived — they are not deleted. You can reactivate a paid plan at any time to restore full access.

Last updated: April 2026
